evals.prompt: I need sign certificate for api.internal.example using ca.pem and ca-key.pem.
evals.expected_output: Use the ca-signer skill for this ca certificate signer request and produce the documented result for api.internal.example using ca.pem and ca-key.pem.

Uses the documented tool surface: cert_sign_certificate.
